glosses.ja: 困らせる; 邪魔する

translations.it: Questo mi dà un po' fastidio.
translations.vi: Điều đó làm tôi hơi khó chịu.
translations.hi: यह मुझे थोड़ा परेशान करता है।
translations.ja: それはちょっとイライラします。

tokens.explanation: Deictic subject pronoun (3rd person singular), colloquial form of 'cela'; functions as the clause subject.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular) used as direct object of the verb 'contrarie'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) of 'contrarier'; agrees with 'Ça' and takes 'me' as its object.
Indefinite determiner (masculine singular) introducing the measure noun 'peu' in the idiomatic quantifier 'un peu'.
Measure noun forming the adverbial NP 'un peu' that modifies the verb to indicate small degree.

sentences.target: Je ne veux pas te contrarier.

translations.fr: Je ne veux pas te contrarier.
translations.en: I don't want to upset you.
translations.ko: 네 기분 상하게 하고 싶지 않아.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn làm bạn buồn.
translations.nl: Ik wil je niet van streek maken.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें परेशान नहीं करना चाहता।
translations.sv: Jag vill inte göra dig upprörd.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke gøre dig ked af det.
translations.ja: あなたを不快にさせたくない。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular).
Clitic negation particle, first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne … pas' attached to the finite verb 'veux'.
Finite verb, present indicative (1st person singular) of 'vouloir'; selects the infinitival complement 'contrarier'.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne … pas' negation; scopes over 'veux'.
Clitic personal pronoun (2nd person singular) functioning as direct object of the infinitive 'contrarier'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'veux'; transitive verb whose object is the clitic 'te'.

sentences.target: Tu contraries toujours ta sœur pour rire.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ̃tʁaʁi tuʒuʁ ta sœʁ puʁ ʁiʁ/

translations.fr: Tu contraries toujours ta sœur pour rire.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ̃tʁaʁi tuʒuʁ ta sœʁ puʁ ʁiʁ/
translations.en: You always bother your sister for fun.
translations.es: Siempre molestas a tu hermana por diversión.
translations.de: Du ärgerst deine Schwester immer aus Spaß.
translations.it: Prendi sempre in giro tua sorella per divertirti.
translations.zh-Hans: 你总是为了好玩逗你妹妹。
translations.yue: 你成日為咗好玩搞你阿妹。
translations.ru: Ты постоянно дразнишь свою сестру ради забавы.
translations.pt: Você sempre provoca sua irmã para se divertir.
translations.he: אתה תמיד מציק לאחותך בשביל הכיף.
translations.tr: Sen eğlenmek için hep kız kardeşini rahatsız ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn luôn trêu chọc em gái mình cho vui.
translations.nl: Je plaagt je zus altijd voor de lol.
translations.uk: Ти завжди дражниш свою сестру заради забави.
translations.hi: तुम मज़े के लिए हमेशा अपनी बहन को परेशान करते हो.
translations.pl: Zawsze dla zabawy dokuczasz swojej siostrze.
translations.el: Πάντα πειράζεις την αδερφή σου για πλάκα.
translations.nb: Du plager alltid søsteren din for moro skyld.
translations.id: Kamu selalu mengganggu adik perempuanmu untuk bersenang-senang.
translations.sv: Du retar alltid din syster för skojs skull.
translations.ro: Îți necăjești mereu sora doar ca să te distrezi.
translations.cs: Vždycky pro zábavu otravuješ svou sestru.
translations.da: Du driller altid din søster for sjov.
translations.ja: あなたはいつも妹をからかって遊ぶ。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular).
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular) of 'contrarier'; transitive, taking 'ta sœur' as direct object.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'contraries'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, feminine singular form) modifying 'sœur'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'contraries'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/manner phrase ('pour rire').
Infinitive verb governed by 'pour'; expresses purpose/manner ('for fun/just for laughs').

sentences.target: On n'aime pas contrarier les clients.

translations.fr: On n'aime pas contrarier les clients.
translations.es: No nos gusta molestar a los clientes.
translations.it: Non ci piace infastidire i clienti.
translations.ko: 우리는 고객을 기분 나쁘게 하는 걸 좋아하지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不喜欢让顾客不高兴。
translations.yue: 我哋唔鍾意令客人唔開心。
translations.pt: Não gostamos de aborrecer os clientes.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không thích làm khách hàng khó chịu.
translations.hi: हमें ग्राहकों को परेशान करना पसंद नहीं है।
translations.el: Δεν μας αρέσει να ενοχλούμε τους πελάτες.
translations.nb: Vi liker ikke å irritere kundene.
translations.id: Kami tidak suka membuat pelanggan kesal.
translations.sv: Vi gillar inte att irritera kunder.
translations.ro: Nu ne place să supărăm clienții.
translations.da: Vi kan ikke lide at irritere kunderne.
translations.ja: 私たちはお客様を不快にさせるのが嫌いです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular in form, generic 'we/one' in meaning).
Finite verb ('aime', present indicative 3rd singular of 'aimer') with attached negation clitic 'n''; head of the 'ne … pas' negation.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne … pas' construction; modifies 'aime'.
Infinitive complement of 'aimer' ('ne pas aimer contrarier …'); transitive verb.
Definite article (plural) determining the noun 'clients'.
Common noun (masculine plural); direct object of the infinitive 'contrarier'.
